creator: mat@FreeBSD.org
text:
$ make distclean extract

$ cd ../../www/xpi-splash
$ make distclean extract
===>  Cleaning for xpi-splash-2.0.2
===>  Deleting distfiles for xpi-splash-2.0.2
===>   NOTICE:

The splash port currently does not have a maintainer. As a result, it is
more likely to have unresolved issues, not be up-to-date, or even be removed in
the future. To volunteer to maintain this port, please create an issue at:

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla

More information about port maintainership is available at:

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/articles/contributing/ports-contributing.html#maintain-port

===>   xpi-splash-2.0.2 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> splash\!-2.0.2-fx+tb+sb.xpi doesn't seem to exist in /home/mat/work/freebsd/distfiles/xpi.
=> Attempting to fetch https://addons.cdn.mozilla.net/user-media/addons/2995/splash\!-2.0.2-fx+tb+sb.xpi
splash!-2.0.2-fx+tb+sb.xpi                    100% of   46 kB 1233 kBps 00m00s

$

Works for me.  Though, this is 10.3, I'll try in a poudriere 10.1 jail.
